ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language for the website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the user */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the user */,
  "children" TEXT /* Children of the user (ages) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of the login event */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of the login event */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time of the logout event */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user session in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for login (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_browser" TEXT /* Browser used for login */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address during login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "page_visited" TEXT /* Page visited by the user */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., click, purchase, search) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the behavior event */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  "referrer_url" TEXT /* URL from which the user arrived */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "behavior_type" TEXT /* Type of behavior (e.g., click, purchase, search, add to cart) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the reset */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the reset request */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Time of the reset request */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Reset token sent to the user */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the password reset request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "reset_date" TEXT /* Date when the password was reset */,
  "reset_time" TEXT /* Time when the password was reset */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the reset request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent to the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., order, account, security) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, delivered, read) */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the security event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the security event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of security event (e.g., login, logout, password reset) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the security event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address involved in the event */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device involved */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_browser" TEXT /* Browser used */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the security event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
